generated_oml:
// C1: Acting Components
instance Motor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor generating torque (τ_M) from input current (I_M) for the first vertical axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]

instance GearWheel : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Intermediate gearwheel component in multi-stage gear transmission reducing torque (τ_G) from motor output"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox reducing torque (τ_out) and enabling precise motion control with low gear ratios for machining applications"
]

// C2: Physical Sensing Components
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring motor current (I_M) from the permanent magnet synchronous motor via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentData
]

instance PrimaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Positional encoder measuring motor angular position (ω_M) with backlash reduction capabilities"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AngularVelocityData
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Positional encoder measuring gearbox output angular position (ω_G) with backlash reduction via dual encoder comparison"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxVelocityData
]

instance TorqueSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Torque sensor measuring mechanical torque (τ) at gearbox output via encoder-based torque calculation"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TorqueData
]

// C3: Data Transmission
instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PrimaryEncoder
]

instance GearboxVelocityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TorqueSensor
]

// C4: Data Types
instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time motor current data (I_M) streamed via MQTT protocol for friction modeling"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time angular velocity data (ω) from primary encoder stream for motion control analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance GearboxVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time gearbox output angular velocity data (ω_G) from secondary encoder stream for friction compensation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time torque data (τ) derived from encoder measurements for friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance MeasuredFrictionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed friction data derived from motor current, torque, and velocity measurements for Coulomb-Viscous-Stribeck modeling"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentData, TorqueData, AngularVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

// C5: Simulation Models
instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model implementing Coulomb-Viscous friction characteristics for motor-gearbox system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model implementing Stribeck friction characteristics for temperature-dependent friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance IdealSystemDynamics : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model computing ideal system dynamics (torque/velocity) using manufacturer-provided robot-specific parameters"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance FrictionCompensationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable friction compensation model integrating Coulomb-Viscous-Stribeck models for real-time motion correction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance DynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamics model computing output torque/velocity from input parameters (manufacturer-provided parameters) for robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

// C6: Enablers
instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol enabling real-time data streaming from sensors (motor current, angular velocity, torque) to digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStreamingService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink environment for executable simulation of friction behaviors (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck) and system dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisService, ModelRefinementService
]

instance SysMLBDD : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram describing structural components (motor, gearbox) and flow definitions (rotational/torque/velocity/electrical)"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService
]

// C7: Services
instance FrictionAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time identification of joint friction (static, kinetic, viscous) using white-box (analytical) and black-box (data-driven) models in multi-physics-aware framework"
    DTDFVocab:provides StaticFrictionInsight, KineticFrictionInsight, ViscousFrictionInsight
]

instance VisualizationDashboard : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Unified visualization platform comparing reference vs. actual motion data (torque/velocity discrepancies) for operator guidance"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionComparisonInsight
]

instance ModelRefinementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous updating of friction models via dynamic exchange of models (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck) during operation for adaptive control"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelUpdateAction
]

instance DataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data aggregation pipeline processing MQTT streams (motor current, angular velocity, torque) for digital shadow integration"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTraceLinkingAction
]

// C8: Insights
instance StaticFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of static friction losses affecting robot motion accuracy during startup phases"
]

instance KineticFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of kinetic friction characteristics affecting consistent motion performance under varying loads"
]

instance ViscousFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of viscous friction losses influenced by operational speed and environmental conditions"
]

instance MotionComparisonInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time comparison between reference motion profiles and actual motion data showing torque/velocity discrepancies"
]

instance FrictionModelUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic dynamic updating of friction models during operation to adapt to wear, load changes, or environmental variations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C9: Environment
instance RobotAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains Motor, GearWheel, CycloidalGearbox
]

instance FrictionAnalysisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel, IdealSystemDynamics
]

instance OperationalEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MotorCurrentData, AngularVelocityData, TorqueData, MeasuredFrictionData
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is **real-time, continuous**, with:
  - **Data Acquisition Frequency**: Sensor data (e.g., motor current, torque) streamed at **high temporal resolution** (implied by live measurements and MQTT protocol for real-time processing).
  - **Model Update Rate**: Friction models are dynamically refined during operation, with **no explicit time-scale specification** mentioned for model updates (assumed to be **sub-second** for adaptive control)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation consists of:
  - **Centralized Digital Shadow**: A unified system integrating live sensor data, simulation models, and visualization dashboards for the robot’s first axis.
  - **Hierarchical Models**: Three-tiered model hierarchy (Engineering → Data Calculation → Simulation) within the **Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM)** (Fig. 1), enabling traceability of data origins and processing steps.
  - **Processing Component**: Consumes input data traces (e.g., motor current) and produces output traces (e.g., simulated friction-affected torque) via executable simulation models."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans the following lifecycle stages:
  - **As Designed**: Structural and behavioral models (SysML BDDs/IBDs) describe the ideal mechanical and electrical architecture of the robot’s first axis.
  - **As Manufactured**: Live sensor data (motor current, torque, angular velocity) and simulation models (MATLAB Simulink) are integrated to detect friction deviations during operation.
  - **As Operated**: Continuous friction modeling and visualization support real-time adjustments to improve motion accuracy in machining applications."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Verification**: Comparison of simulated friction models (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck) with live measurements (e.g., torque/velocity deviations).
  - **Validation**: Real-time validation of motion accuracy improvements via dashboard visualization of reference vs. actual data.
  - **Uncertainty Handling**: Traceability via **AAS** and **DSRM** allows identification of data sources and model parameters (e.g., manufacturer-provided robot dynamics) to mitigate errors.
  - **Model Calibration**: Dynamic exchange of friction models during operation compensates for wear or environmental changes (e.g., temperature, load)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT technical connection uses:
  - **MQTT Protocol**: For real-time data streaming from sensors (motor current, torque, angular velocity) to the digital shadow.
  - **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)**: Enables structured data integration and semantic linking between physical and virtual components.
  - **SysML Models**: For structural and behavioral modeling of the robot’s first axis (BDDs/IBDs)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to:
  - **SysML**: For structural/behavioral modeling of the robot’s first axis.
  - **Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM)**: For traceability and semantic support in data integration.
  - **MQTT Protocol**: For real-time data communication between sensors and the digital shadow."
]
